message:
fix(exec): add session logging to Claude PTY bypass and reorder checks

The Claude bypass in SmartRunner.Run() was placed after the detector
and handler initialization, wasting allocations for a code path that
never uses them. More importantly, the bypass skipped all session
logging (EventActivate + WrapSession), making Claude sessions invisible
to caam analytics/history.

- Move Claude bypass before detector/handler init
- Add EventActivate log and WrapSession defer to bypass path
- Claude sessions now appear in `caam history` correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
